mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, name, phone, role, created_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT user_id, username, password, name, phone, role, created_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, username, password, name, phone, role, created_at FROM users WHERE role IN ('ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') ORDER BY CASE WHEN role = 'SUPER_ADMIN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, created_at DESC, user_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'SUPER_ADMIN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, username, password, name, phone, role, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_user.NEXTVAL, #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
